preferences.objective: Stay on track in CSE 512: Distributed Database Systems (2025 Fall C)

plan.overview: Course Description: Distributed Database Systems (DDS) is a 3-credit course that offers a comprehensive exploration of managing data across interconnected databases.
recommendations: Study about 8 hours per week in 60-minute sessions.
Use Tue, Thu as your main study days with roughly 4 focused block(s) each day across the full date range.
Focus only on these modules: W03 - 9/10, W05 - 9/24, W07 - 10/08.

tasks: Review W03 - 9/10 and capture the key ideas.
Write 3 to 5 quick recall questions.
Finish one focused practice block for this session.
Review W05 - 9/24 and capture the key ideas.
Write 3 to 5 quick recall questions.
Finish one focused practice block for this session.
Review W07 - 10/08 and capture the key ideas.
Write 3 to 5 quick recall questions.
Finish one focused practice block for this session.

customTips: Turn each module into 3 to 5 recall questions.
Reserve one session each week only for practice and self-testing.
Update this plan after new announcements or due dates appear in Canvas.
